blended.narrative: Mission Ridge is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 9 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 2,487 ft. Looking ahead, 12 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 10" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tomorrow: 3.0" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 43°F.

recent_conditions.narrative: No new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 11".
